description.value: Aura faint illusion; CL 1st; Slot none; Price 1,500 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This small, polished leather case opens to reveal a mirror, face powder, rouge, and a puff. Using the puff and uttering a command word allows you to change your appearance once per day as per disguise self. Additionally, you get a +2 competence bonus on Diplomacy checks made to gather information. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, disguise self; Special creator must have at least 2 ranks in Diplomacy; Cost 750 gp
